description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a cylindrical metal head with flat striking faces on both ends, ideal for delivering forceful, controlled blows. The head is made of a silvery-gray metal, likely steel, and is securely attached to a straight, black handle. The handle is covered with a textured, ribbed grip, likely made of rubber or a similar material, providing enhanced comfort and slip resistance during use. The overall design is utilitarian and functional, with no visible decorative elements or branding. The hammer appears clean and well-maintained, with no signs of wear or damage. Its proportions and construction suggest it is suitable for heavy-duty tasks in urban environments such as construction, repair, or maintenance.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a cylindrical metal head and a black, ribbed, rubberized handle for a secure grip. The tool is clean, sturdy, and designed for forceful striking tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the hammer, with the cylindrical metal head and the ribbed black handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the circular end of the hammer's head and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, again showing the cylindrical head and ribbed handle, with no additional features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the other circular striking face and the handle's profile.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, black, rubberized ergonomic grip with ribbed texture for enhanced hold and comfort.
attribute_head_type: Cylindrical double-faced sledge-type head made of metal, with flat striking surfaces on both ends.
